description: Migrate the Jira plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache, replace manual waitForAuth with waitUntil, and replace manual meta tag reading with getMetaContent.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/jira && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Jira plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Jira's manual token persistence, waitForAuth, and meta tag reading with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: getPersistedAuth/setPersistedAuth replaced with getAuthCache/setAuthCache using namespace 'jira'
waitForAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
Meta tag reads use getMetaContent from SDK instead of document.querySelector
No setInterval or clearInterval calls remain in auth code
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/jira/src/jira-api.ts

Context:
1. Token persistence at lines 8-29. Jira stores `JiraAuth` object (accountId, cloudId, baseUrl). Replace with getAuthCache<JiraAuth>('jira') and setAuthCache('jira', auth). Note: Jira does NOT have clearPersistedAuth — only get and set.

2. Meta tag reads at lines 35-36:
```typescript
const accountId = document.querySelector('meta[name="ajs-atlassian-account-id"]')?.getAttribute('content');
const cloudId = document.querySelector('meta[name="ajs-cloud-id"]')?.getAttribute('content');
```
Replace with:
```typescript
const accountId = getMetaContent('ajs-atlassian-account-id');
const cloudId = getMetaContent('ajs-cloud-id');
```

3. waitForAuth at lines 47-64 — standard polling pattern.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change isAuthenticated() logic beyond using getMetaContent
- Do NOT change api() or any tool files
